metadata.name: int_loan_monthly_snapshot
metadata.comment: Loan-month grain view joining staged monthly performance to origination attributes. Materialized incrementally (merge on loan_id, reporting_month) so each run processes only new loan-months and shorter statements are less likely to hit Neon connection limits. For lag columns, the prior in-database month is unioned into the window for each touched loan. Optional dbt vars for bounded loads: snapshot_reporting_month_start / snapshot_reporting_month_end (YYYY-MM-DD, compared to reporting_month). Use overlapping backfill windows only with care.
